outlook.volatilityExpectation: High volatility expected due to aggregate negative GEX in weekly/monthly expiries; dealers short gamma will amplify moves.
outlook.summary: Market is trapped below the 0DTE Gamma Flip at 676 with heavy negative GEX in tenors beyond today. While 0DTE shows stability, the structural weekly/monthly profile is volatile. 660 Put Wall is the critical structural support.

levels.motivazione: Massive Put Open Interest dominant across 0DTE (24k), Weekly (63k), and Monthly (164k). Primary structural support.
0DTE Gamma Flip level aligns with high volume Call strikes. Shift from positive to negative gamma exposure.
Weekly and Monthly Max Pain coincides with significant Call OI. Strong magnetic attraction and resistance.
Immediate term max pain level, spot is drifting away but remains an intraday attraction.
Major resistance in Monthly (69k OI) and Weekly (15k OI). Cap for upside movements.
Deep support with substantial OI in Weekly (62k) and Monthly (122k). Emergency buffer.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed intraday (Positive GEX) but structurally high (Negative Monthly GEX); expect pinning near 600 with volatility expansion on break of 590.
outlook.summary: Market is caught between massive structural support at 590 and the magnetic pull of Max Pain at 600. 0DTE positive gamma suggests intraday stabilization, while negative monthly gamma indicates fragility.

levels.motivazione: Perfect alignment: 0DTE & Monthly Max Pain + Massive OI cluster (92k Puts, 47k Calls). Primary dealer target.
Dominant Put OI across Weekly (11.9k) and Monthly (85.4k). Structural floor defined by dealers.
Significant Call OI concentration (0DTE 12.8k, Monthly 35.8k). Immediate resistance above spot.
0DTE Gamma Flip level. Shifts dealer hedging from supportive to restrictive.
Monthly Gamma Flip. Critical inflection point for broader trend validity.
